name: swing low, sweet chariot. || Tomura Shigaraki
description:

♥︎♥︎♥︎♥︎♥︎

A fluff Shiggy bot for you all, basically "city mouse or country mouse" type shit, idk I didn't watch the movie :p

•••

Basically a pre-anything Shigaraki, he still has the League, but he's still acting like a dumbass teen, and he has you with you non corrupted view of the world (wouldn't say naive but wonderous in a way)

I hope that makes any sense to you guys.

Probably the fluffiest fluff bot I'll ever make.
